title: cyperus × yamamotoi
intro: Cyperus × yamamotoi, also known as Yamamoto's papyrus sedge, is a rare hybrid plant in the sedge family (Cyperaceae) that is found in Japan. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cyperus × yamamotoi include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its rhizomes are dried and used in traditional Japanese medicine.
